app.name: Vorsorge Wizard
app.tagline: Your advance directive documents — simple, secure, private.

intro.title: Create Your Advance Directives
intro.subtitle: Legally structured documents in just a few steps — free and without a lawyer.
intro.doc1Desc: Define which medical treatments should be carried out in specific situations.
intro.doc2Desc: Designate a trusted person who may make decisions on your behalf.
intro.doc3Desc: Suggest to the court who should become your guardian, if necessary.
intro.disclaimerText: Vorsorge Wizard does not provide legal advice. The generated documents are based on commonly accepted formulations and do not replace individual legal counsel. For complex financial situations or special medical circumstances, we recommend consulting a lawyer or notary.
intro.privacyNote: Your data stays private. No account needed to get started.

personalInfo.title: Personal Information
personalInfo.subtitle: This information is needed for your advance directive documents.

trustedPerson.title: Trusted Person
trustedPerson.subtitle: Choose a person you trust to make decisions on your behalf in case of emergency.
trustedPerson.alternateHint: If your primary trusted person is unavailable, this person can act in their place.
trustedPerson.whyAlternateText: If your primary trusted person is unreachable or incapacitated, the alternate person assumes all rights and responsibilities.

medicalPreferences.title: Treatment Preferences
medicalPreferences.subtitle: Define which medical treatments you wish to receive or decline.

cpr.title: Cardiopulmonary Resuscitation (CPR)
cpr.question: Should resuscitation measures be performed?
cpr.tooltip: In case of cardiac arrest, measures like chest compressions and defibrillation are taken to restart the heart.

ventilation.title: Mechanical Ventilation
ventilation.question: Should you be mechanically ventilated?
ventilation.tooltip: A ventilator takes over the breathing function when you can no longer breathe independently.

artificialNutrition.title: Artificial Nutrition
artificialNutrition.question: Should you receive artificial nutrition?
artificialNutrition.tooltip: Nutrients are delivered through a tube directly to the stomach (PEG tube) or through a vein (parenteral nutrition).

dialysis.title: Dialysis
dialysis.question: Should dialysis be performed?
dialysis.tooltip: A machine takes over the function of the kidneys and cleanses the blood of waste products.

antibiotics.title: Antibiotics
antibiotics.question: Should antibiotics be used to treat infections?
antibiotics.tooltip: Medications that fight bacterial infections. In certain situations, an infection may be considered part of the natural dying process.

painManagement.title: Pain Management
painManagement.question: Should comprehensive pain management be provided?
painManagement.tooltip: Strong painkillers (e.g., morphine) can relieve pain and suffering. In high doses, they may shorten life expectancy as a side effect.
painManagement.note: Note: Most people wish for comprehensive pain management.

situationalScenarios.title: Situational Scenarios
situationalScenarios.subtitle: In which situations should your treatment preferences apply?
situationalScenarios.hint: Please select at least one scenario.

terminalIllness.title: Terminal Illness
terminalIllness.description: When I suffer from an incurable disease that will lead to death despite medical treatment.
terminalIllness.info: A condition where, in medical judgment, no cure is possible and death will occur in the foreseeable future.

irreversibleUnconsciousness.title: Irreversible Unconsciousness
irreversibleUnconsciousness.description: When I have permanently lost consciousness and, in medical judgment, will not regain it.
irreversibleUnconsciousness.info: A state where the brain is so severely damaged that regaining consciousness is excluded according to scientific knowledge.

severeDementia.title: Severe Dementia
severeDementia.description: When, due to advanced dementia, I am no longer able to recognize people, communicate, or act independently.
severeDementia.info: The end stage of a dementia illness where independent living is no longer possible.

valuesWishes.title: Values and Personal Wishes
valuesWishes.subtitle: Optional: Describe in your own words what is important to you.
valuesWishes.personalValuesPlaceholder: e.g., It is important to me that I may die with dignity and my family is around me.
valuesWishes.religiousWishesPlaceholder: e.g., I wish for spiritual support.

organDonationOptions.yes: Yes, I am willing to donate organs

exampleTexts: It is important to me that I may die at home.
I do not want life-prolonging measures if I am no longer of sound mind.
My family should be informed about my wishes.

summary.title: Summary
summary.subtitle: Please review your information carefully.
summary.confirm: I have reviewed all information and confirm its accuracy.
summary.disclaimerReminder: The generated documents are based on your information and commonly accepted formulations. They do not replace individual legal advice.

account.title: Create Account
account.subtitle: Create an account to save your documents and download them again later.
account.loginSubtitle: Sign in to save your documents.
account.acceptTerms: I accept the Terms of Service

generate.title: Your Documents
generate.success: Your documents have been successfully created!
generate.printHint: Please print and sign the documents. Only signed documents are legally valid.

dashboard.title: My Documents
dashboard.empty: You haven't created any documents yet.
dashboard.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this document package? This action cannot be undone.
dashboard.deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account and all associated data? This action cannot be undone.

footer.disclaimer: Vorsorge Wizard does not provide legal advice.

validation.postalCodeFormat: Please enter a valid 5-digit postal code.
validation.phoneFormat: Please enter a valid phone number.
validation.atLeastOneScenario: Please select at least one scenario.
validation.alternatePersonRequired: Please fill in the alternate person information.
validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
